DeSSERT Lab
Admin Panel
Missing token.
DeSSERT Lab Admin
Paste BibTeX entry
Paste one or more @article{…} entries. They will be prepended to — and a pull request will be opened for review.
▶ Browse existing entries
MSc Thesis Proposals
Select a course, manage its thesis proposals, and open a pull request to update _teaching/thesis_proposals.md.
▶ Browse current proposals
New Post
Create a news post or event announcement. A pull request will be opened to add it to _posts/.
Seminar Details
will create a new file in _posts/
► Browse existing posts
